storePath.label: Password Store Path
storePath.desc: Custom path to the password store (default: ~/.password-store)

typeDelay.label: Launcher Close Delay
typeDelay.desc: Delay before typing starts in seconds (default: 0.5)

wtypeDelay.label: Wtype Keystroke Delay
wtypeDelay.desc: Delay between keystrokes in ms for wtype (default: 12)

clipTimeout.label: Clipboard Timeout
clipTimeout.desc: Seconds before clipboard is cleared (empty = env/PASSWORD_STORE_CLIP_TIME, default: 45)
